new.name: CVE-2026-63030
new.description: Proof-of-concept exploit for CVE-2026-63030, a pre-authentication vulnerability in WordPress (versions 6.9.0 through 7.0.1).

new.name: CVE-2026-48206
new.description: Reproducer for CVE-2026-48206: Apache Camel camel-jira IssueKey (and other non-Camel-prefixed) header injection driving arbitrary JIRA issue operations with the endpoint's service-account credentials (fixed in 4.14.8/4.18.3/4.21.0)

new.name: CVE-2026-4858
new.description: CVE-2026-4858 research

new.name: CVE-2025-57819-POC
new.description: FreePBX 未认证SQL注入导致远程代码执行，FreePBX 15 (低于 15.0.66)、16 (低于 16.0.89)、17 (低于 17.0.3)。该漏洞位于商业化“endpoint”模块中，因对用户输入过滤不严，允许未认证的攻击者绕过管理员权限，执行SQL注入，并最终实现远程代码执行

new.name: htb-connected-writeup
new.description: Writeup for HackTheBox Connected — FreePBX CVE-2025-57819 SQLi + incron privesc

new.name: CVE-2026-49042
new.description: PoC reproducer for CVE-2026-49042 (Apache Camel camel-langchain4j-tools): a prompt-injected LLM's tool-call arguments become unfiltered Exchange headers, hijacking the tool route's exec: sink for RCE. Fixed in 4.14.8/4.18.3/4.21.0.

new.name: sxwp2shell
new.description: WordPress wp2shell pre-auth RCE exploit kit (CVE-2026-63030 + CVE-2026-60137)

new.name: holy-wp2shell
new.description: Critical Wordpress to Shell (unauthenticated)

new.name: wp2shell
new.description: PoC for CVE-2026-63030 + CVE-2026-60137, AKA WP2Shell

new.name: wp2shell-checker
new.description: WordPress Core Unauthenticated RCE (CVE-2026-63030, CVE-2026-60137)

new.name: CVE-2026-49086
new.description: PoC reproducer for CVE-2026-49086 (Apache Camel camel-dapr): the pub/sub consumer copies the untrusted CloudEvent's pubsubName/topic into producer-routing headers, letting an attacker redirect a republished message to an arbitrary Dapr pub/sub component+topic (confused deputy). Fixed in 4.14.8/4.18.3/4.21.0.

new.name: jenkins_scan
new.description: Find jenkins environment and checks for CVE-2024-23897

new.name: cve-2026-41940-PoC
new.description: A cPanel and WHM authentication bypassing tool

new.name: CVE-2026-49097
new.description: PoC reproducer for CVE-2026-49097 (Apache Camel camel-irc): the non-Camel-prefixed irc.sendTo header escapes the HTTP header filter and overrides the producer's configured channel, redirecting an IRC message to an attacker-chosen destination. Fixed in 4.14.8/4.18.3/4.21.0.

new.name: apache-cve-2021-42013-lab
new.description: Docker ortamında Apache HTTP Server 2.4.49 (CVE-2021-42013) zafiyetinin gösterildiği laboratuvar çalışması.

new.name: CVE-2026-63030-Wp2Shell
new.description: WordPress REST API SQLi to RCE (CVE-2026-63030)

new.name: THM-Tempest

new.name: HTB-Pterodactyl-Writeup
new.description: HTB Season 10 - Pterodactyl machine writeup. Medium Linux box covering CVE-2025-49132 (Pterodactyl Panel RCE) and CVE-2025-6018/6019 (udisks2 privilege escalation).

new.name: CVE-2026-49098
new.description: PoC reproducer for CVE-2026-49098 (Apache Camel camel-kafka): the non-Camel-prefixed kafka.OVERRIDE_TOPIC header escapes the upstream HTTP header filter and overrides the producer's configured topic, injecting an attacker-forged record onto a privileged Kafka topic (cross-topic injection). Fixed in 4.14.8/4.18.3/4.21.0.

new.name: CVE-2026-11374-check
new.description: Detection script for CVE-2026-11374

new.name: PoC-Unauthenticated-RCE-in-WatchGuard-Fireware-12.7-Build-640389-CVE-2025-9242
new.description: Version-pinned archival PoC for CVE-2025-9242 on WatchGuard Fireware 12.7 build 640389. Includes safe detection, offline payload analysis, and an explicitly gated reverse-shell exploit using a caller-supplied IPv4 callback endpoint.

new.name: CVE-2026-42533-Config-Scanner
new.description: Static config scanner that flags nginx configs vulnerable to the complex_value two-pass capture-clobbering bug (regex map + regex capture → heap overflow / info leak).

new.name: wp2shell-Wordpress-TOWN
new.description: Unauthenticated Remote Code Execution (RCE) in WordPress Core allows attackers to execute arbitrary code without logging in by chaining CVE-2026-63030 and CVE-2026-60137, potentially leading to full site compromise.

new.name: wp2shell-cf-WAF-bypass
new.description: wp2shell PoC with Cloudflare WAF bypass via body padding (CVE-2026-63030)

new.name: ghostlock-vagrant-box
new.description: An isolated Vagrant testbed designed to simulate a complete attack chain: Initial access via the Nginx heap buffer overflow (CVE-2026-42533) followed by root privilege escalation using the Ghostlock kernel vulnerability (CVE-2026-43449).

new.name: nginx-map-risk-audit
new.description: Defensive NGINX CVE-2026-42533 map regex risk audit with config scanner, Splunk/Defender notes, and lab evidence.

update.name: CVE-2026-15409-15410-Framework
update.description: CVE-2026-15409/15410 SonicWall SMA1000 multi-exploit Framework 🔥 SSRF→Erlang RPC→RCE→root privesc. Features: --detect safe check, --exec, --read-file, --privesc, --rpc, interactive shell, batch threading, file write, ws-url override, pipe support.🛡️ KEV listed CVSS 10.0 actively exploited. Authorized testing only. Use Ethically, Stay Legal. 🔒

update.description: This repo contains a proof-of-concept exploit for CVE-2026-15409.
